title: Brochure Template Redesign
desc: I have two existing brochures that need a redesign. We need something that is more colorful and professional. There's a third brochure I'd like to include that hasn't been created yet. We want to look more polished, professional, and brand consistent. These look too mom and pop-ish. I would like a digital magazine (page-turning) with a redesigned version of the same content, but packaged better. I've included 2 of the 3 brochures, as the third's content is still being finalized.

title: Bulk Canva Hip-Hop Cover Design
desc: Only reply to this if you can do 50 hiphop album covers from canva.com for $30 TOTAL. not $30 per cover. $30 for all 50 covers. im looking for hard workers only! DO NOT APPLY IF YOU WANT MORE money. thanks.

title: Canva Social Media Poster Design
desc: I’m looking for a designer who can jump straight into Canva and turn my ideas into clean, modern social-media posters. I’ll send over the current brand colours, fonts, and any reference imagery so you can stay perfectly on-brand without extra back-and-forth. The goal is to have scroll-stopping visuals that I can publish on Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter the moment they land in my inbox. Each graphic should be sized correctly for its platform, export-ready (RGB, 72 dpi, PNG/JPG), and saved as an editable Canva file so small text tweaks are still possible later. Deliverables • One eye-catching master layout adapted for Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter • Editable Canva links plus flattened exports for immediate upload If you can start right away and keep the look fresh, I’m ready to collaborate today.

title: Clean Professional YouTube Thumbnail
desc: I need a set of eye-catching YouTube thumbnails that feel professional and clean while still matching the upbeat, entertainment-driven tone of my channel. Each thumbnail must incorporate my channel logo so the branding stays consistent across every video that goes live. Here’s what I’m looking for: create a polished layout that balances strong visual hierarchy with just enough energy to spark curiosity without sliding into clutter. Think crisp typography, restrained colour blocking, and smart use of whitespace—no loud neon or over-stuffed collages. The design should instantly tell viewers “quality entertainment” and entice them to click. You’ll deliver: • One fully finished thumbnail, sized at YouTube’s recommended 1280 × 720 px (16:9), ready to upload. • The editable source file (PSD, AI, or Figma—your choice) so I can tweak text for future episodes. • A quick note on the fonts and colour codes used, in case I need to keep the style consistent on other assets. If you have a portfolio of similarly clean, branded thumbnails for entertainment channels, I’d love to see a few examples when you send your proposal.

title: Concert Poster & Thumbnail Design
desc: I need a striking visual package for an upcoming live concert: one full-size poster, a web banner, and a matching thumbnail. All three pieces must share the same look and feel, quickly telling viewers that this is a can’t-miss performance while leaving room for the event’s essentials—artist name, date, venue, time, and ticket link. The poster will be printed at A3, the banner will be used across social media headers, and the thumbnail must stay clear at small sizes (YouTube, Instagram profile, etc.). Please supply layered source files (AI or PSD) alongside ready-to-use PNG/JPEG exports so my team can tweak text if anything changes last minute. I’ll decide largely on proven experience with music or event graphics, so include links to previous concert promos or comparable work when you reply. Let me know roughly how long you’ll need and what you require from me to start (logos, photos, colour guidelines, etc.). Looking forward to seeing how you can make this concert stand out.

title: Documentary Film Poster Designer Needed
desc: I'm looking for a graphic designer to create a professional festival-style poster for my documentary film. I already have the main image and overall concept. I need a designer with strong typography and design skills to elevate it into a polished, cinematic poster. Film Title: ROX & THE BLUE GUITAR A Love Revolution Current Poster Text: • A FILM BY ROX COOPER LEE • ROX & THE BLUE GUITAR A LOVE REVOLUTION • A ROX MATLACK STUDIOS PRODUCTION What I Need: • Refined poster layout and typography • Premium cinematic aesthetic • Elegant serif typography • Strong hierarchy and spacing • Professional colour grading and finishing if needed • Festival-quality final design Deliverables: • Layered PSD or AI file • High-resolution print-ready PDF • JPG

title: Engaging Historical YouTube Thumbnails
desc: I’m preparing a new batch of YouTube videos and the historical series is going live first, so I need an eye-catching thumbnail (or a small set, depending on your concept) that instantly signals “history” to viewers while still looking fresh in the feed. Core concept • The thumbnail must feature recognisable historical figures—portraits, busts, silhouettes, or any creative treatment that fits the topic. • Colour grading, typography and layout should evoke a sense of the past without feeling dusty; think cinematic teasers rather than textbook covers. Secondary uses Once this historical design language is locked in, I’ll adapt the same visual energy to upcoming horror, vlog and story episodes, so design choices should be versatile enough for future tweaks. What I need from you • A polished thumbnail delivered in 1280 × 720 px (max 2 MB, .PNG & .PSD). • A quick preview mock-up on a typical YouTube page so I can judge click-through appeal. • Source files layered and well-labelled for easy text swaps later. How to win the job Send me a detailed project proposal outlining your concept, workflow, and turnaround time. Feel free to include references or prior work if it helps illustrate your idea, but the proposal itself is what I’ll weigh most heavily. I’ll review proposals as they arrive

title: Enhance CV Appearance
desc: I need someone from Australia to enhance the appearance of my CV. The content is already prepared, so the focus is on making it visually appealing. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and CV writing to ensure the final product is professional and eye-catching. I should be provided with a word copy and one that publishes well to PDF.

title: Fiction Book Cover Scheme Design
desc: Design a versatile fiction book cover template/scheme for a young publishing imprint. The template should accommodate a wide array of fiction styles and allow for a strong brand continuity between titles. The brand already has logo, website, graphic elements, etc., and has published non-fiction books. The design should signal intellectual daring and seriousness, without becoming too austere. The design should be adaptable to different fiction genres (rather than book series) while maintaining a cohesive look that represents the imprint's brand. The ideal candidate will have experience in book cover design and a strong understanding of branding principles. A full brief is attached.

title: Graphic designer needed for creativity
desc: Project Description: I am seeking a Graphic Designer to design a high-impact promotional flyer for a nightlife entertainment event themed "BLACKOUT." The objective will create a bold, premium, and attention-grabbing visual that would appeal to young adults and partygoers while effectively communicating key event information Responsibilities: . Developed the creative concept and visual direction. . Create dramatic dark -themed composition using cinematic lighting effects. . Design a strong typographic hierarchy to emphasize the event name, date, venue, and ticket information. . Applied color contrast (red, blue, white, and metallic silver) to enhance visibility and visual appeal. . integrated promotional details including DJs, MC, venue, organizers, and contract information. . Optimized the layout for social media marketing and digital event promotion. Design Objective: . Increase event awareness and attendance . . Establish a premium nightlife brand identity. . Deliver clear information while maintaining a visually engaging design. . capture attention quickly on social media feeds. The Ideal candidate must have an eye for creativity, the ability to deliver eye-catching premium flyer. Kindly attach a file of your previous work. I look forward to your feedback

title: InDesign Magazine Cover Editing
desc: I need an InDesign designer to edit my magazine cover. We have the image and text ready, but need assistance with formatting, font ideas, and color matching to ensure a cohesive look. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and a keen eye for detail.

title: Inspirational TikTok Book Promo Video
desc: I need a short, punchy TikTok that inspires viewers to check out my new book. The clip should run between 20-40 seconds, feel motivational, and flow naturally on the “For You” page. Here’s what has to be woven in: • One or two standout quotes straight from the book • A brief on-screen or voice-over author message (I’ll supply the exact wording) • Visuals that echo the book’s central theme—this could be footage, motion graphics, or stylised text, as long as it matches the mood Please pace the edits to match trending inspirational sounds, add engaging captions where they make sense, and keep the final export TikTok-ready in 1080×1920 (MP4). Delivery: final video plus the editable project file so I can tweak text or replace clips later if needed.

title: Instagram Content Creation & Management
desc: I have just launched an institute and I need someone to fully manage my Instagram presence. The goal is to publish fresh, on-brand image posts, short-form videos, and stories several times each week, maintain a cohesive feed, and engage with the audience in real time. Here is what the collaboration should cover: • A monthly content calendar outlining post themes, captions, and key dates. • Original graphics or edited photos (Canva, Adobe Photoshop/Illustrator welcome) that match my visual guidelines. • Vertical videos/Reels cut and captioned for maximum reach—feel free to use Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar. • Stories with interactive elements (polls, questions, links) scheduled at optimal times. • End-to-end scheduling through Later, Buffer, or Meta Business Suite so everything goes out on autopilot. • Weekly performance recap with insights and simple next-step recommendations. All raw files and final exports must be delivered in editable formats, ready for reuse. Please keep brand tone consistent and be responsive to quick tweaks before each post goes live.

title: Instagram Growth & Sales Management
desc: I need a committed social-media pro to take over day-to-day management of my Instagram account and turn it into a consistent sales engine. The core of each week will be three feed posts built around product showcases—high-quality banners or short, engaging videos that make it clear why each item matters. In parallel, four Instagram Stories should go live every week, alternating between new product announcements, real customer interactions, and quick behind-the-scenes glimpses so followers feel connected to the brand. Beyond content production, I’m expecting you to plan the posting calendar, write captions, research hashtags, and reply to comments and DMs fast enough to keep the conversation flowing. Please track performance in Instagram Insights (or a similar analytics tool) and adjust creative, timing, or targeting whenever you spot an opportunity to push reach, engagement, and—most importantly—sales. Deliverables each month: • 12 feed posts (image or video, ready to publish) • 16 Stories (mixed formats) • Engagement report with growth metrics, top-performing content, and next-step recommendations Success will be measured by steady increases in follower interaction and a clear uptick in attributed sales, so data-driven tweaking is essential. If you have a track record of convert

title: Instagram Post Designer Needed
desc: Looking for a Graphic Designer I’m looking for a graphic designer to create an eye-catching and professional image for an Instagram post announcing a giveaway. Requirements: * Modern and engaging design * Optimized for Instagram post format * Clear presentation of the giveaway details (to be provided) * High-quality final file ready for publishing If interested, please send your portfolio and rates via private message. Thank you!

title: Instagram Post Graphics & Reels
desc: I need fresh, scroll-stopping content for my Instagram feed. Your main focus will be on designing single-image post graphics that look instantly appealing while fitting my brand aesthetic. Each graphic must include well-placed text overlays so key messages pop without overwhelming the visuals. Alongside the static posts, I’d also like light video editing for short reels—simple cuts, on-brand colour grading and the same text overlay style—so the grid and reels feel cohesive. All files should be sized correctly for Instagram (1080×1080 for posts, 1080×1920 for reels) and delivered in both ready-to-publish formats (PNG/MP4) and editable source files. If you have a knack for turning ideas into engaging visuals and can keep a consistent tone across graphics and videos, let’s talk about the first batch right away.

title: Instagram Reels Brand Awareness Strategy
desc: I want to lift my brand’s visibility on Instagram purely through organic methods, and short-form video is central to that plan. I already know that Reels resonate best with my audience, so every piece of content we create will be designed for that format first. Your job is to help me shape a clear, consistent Reels strategy, produce thumb-stopping videos, and make sure each post drives recognisable lifts in brand awareness rather than chasing vanity metrics. Here’s what I’m looking for: a weekly content cadence we can both keep up with, creative concepts that reflect my brand voice, and polished edits ready to publish. You’d be free to shoot fresh footage or repurpose existing clips, as long as the final Reels feel cohesive and on-brand. I’ll handle product knowledge and talking points; you’ll bring storytelling, motion graphics, trending-audio selection, and seamless editing in apps like Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or native Instagram tools. Success will be measured by reach, shares, saves, and overall profile views—signals that new people are discovering us and sticking around. If you have a proven track record of growing brand awareness through organic Reels and can show clear before-and-after examples, let’s take this channel to the next level.

title: Instagram Video & Photo Creation
desc: I need a steady stream of Instagram-ready assets that look crisp, consistent, and unmistakably on-brand. The work covers both short-form videos and high-resolution photos, all finished in a professional, polished style. You’ll receive my raw footage, stills, copy prompts, and brand guidelines; your job is to turn them into upload-ready posts that: • showcase the brand logo in a clean, tasteful spot • use concise text overlays to reinforce each message or call-to-action • (for videos) include royalty-free background music that matches the brand’s tone Typical workflow: you edit, color-grade, add motion graphics or typography, pick suitable background music, and export in the correct Instagram dimensions—1080×1350 for feed posts and 1080×1920 for reels/stories. I’m aiming for three to four finished assets a week with one round of tweaks before sign-off. Acceptance criteria • Final .mp4 videos and .jpg photos ready to upload, free of compression artifacts • Text and logo elements remain fully visible within Instagram safe zones • Music is properly licensed for social use • Source project files (Premiere Pro/After Effects, Photoshop, etc.) delivered with organized layers for future edits When you reply, please link to a few Instagram edits that highlight clean typography, smooth paci

title: Instagram Video Content Creator
desc: I need fresh, scroll-stopping videos made specifically for my Instagram account—no Facebook or Twitter assets, just pure Instagram content. The task is to plan, craft and hand over short vertical clips that fit my brand and encourage engagement. What I expect from each post: • A simple concept outline approved before you edit • Final video in 1080×1920, up to 60 seconds, ready to publish as a Reel or feed video • On-screen text, captions and royalty-free audio where it helps tell the story • A quick caption plus 5–10 relevant hashtags I’ll share my branding guidelines, previous posts and any product images you might need. Please deliver the finished MP4s through a shared drive and allow one revision round per clip. Once the first sample meets the criteria we can switch to a steady flow of new videos.

title: Korean War Silver Star Reel
desc: I want to turn the written account of my father’s Korean-War Silver Star action into a short, historically accurate social-media reel. The piece should feel like a concise mini-documentary—rich in context yet easy for today’s viewers to absorb. What I can give you: • the original award citation and any supporting text I have • several clear photos of my dad from the period Here’s what I’m hoping you’ll craft: • a vertical video ready for Instagram/Facebook Reels and TikTok (export in 1080×1920 MP4) • tasteful background music that underscores the era without overpowering the narration • a clean, well-paced voice-over that tells the story, matches the citation, and pronounces names correctly • subtle motion graphics or captions to highlight key dates, locations, and the Silver Star itself Tone: historical and informative—no cinematic exaggeration, just an engaging retelling of what happened and why it mattered. Please weave in the photos I supply, add royalty-free archival images or maps where useful, and be mindful of respectful representation of all service members involved. Process suggestions (open to your workflow): share a brief storyboard or script draft first, then a rough cut, and finally the polished reel with any minor tweaks. Let me know what you need from me up front—

title: Minimalist TikTok Product Edit - 01/06/2026 08:43 EDT
desc: I need a crisp, 30-second TikTok video that spotlights one of my store’s key products. The look must stay minimal and clean—plenty of breathing room, subtle transitions, and no clutter—so the product images I provide do all the talking. The objective is simple: convince viewers to check out the item and tap through to my online shop. Feel free to suggest a light music bed or a short, tasteful text tag if it enhances engagement, but the visual center should remain firmly on the product itself. Please deliver: • A 9:16 MP4 ready for TikTok (1080×1920, 30 fps). • The editable project file so I can tweak price or logo later. If this sounds clear, let me know your turnaround time and any questions you need answered before you start.

title: NHS Social Media Video Management
desc: I need a creative who can fully take over our Facebook and Instagram channels and keep them active with one fresh, NHS-themed campaign video or post every week. they should stay true to the informative tone used across official NHS materials while still feeling engaging and platform-appropriate. Alongside the social posts, I also need longer or looped informative videos assembled for the TV screen at our site. I already hold some approved footage, logos and brand assets, but not everything you will need, so part of the job is to source or create the missing clips, motion graphics or voice-overs to complete each piece. Here’s how I see the workflow: • Planning: You propose a weekly content calendar that ties into current NHS campaigns. One hour per week to complete this • Production: Edit or create the short-form social video and a companion long-form screen version, blending any footage I supply with new material you generate. • Publishing & optimisation: Upload, write the captions, hashtags and alt text, then schedule for the agreed times. • Reporting: Provide concise monthly stats on reach, engagement and any insights for improvement. Output must be delivered in platform-ready aspect ratios (1080×1920 for stories/reels, 1920×1080 for the TV screen) and encoded for smooth playba

title: Ongoing AI Reel Editing
desc: I’m launching my content-creator journey with a channel devoted to practical, bite-size insights into AI. To keep the focus on the information rather than flashy gimmicks, I’m looking for an editor who can shape a clear, balanced vertical reel each time—no hyper-fast montages or heavy VFX, just clean pacing, tight storytelling and smart use of text or graphics where it genuinely helps the viewer understand the concept. Every reel will be published simultaneously on Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts, so each cut must arrive in 1080 × 1920, under 60 seconds, with hard-coded captions, subtle music that’s license-safe for both platforms, and smooth colour correction. If a quick motion-graphic callout or screen recording overlay helps explain an AI workflow, feel free to add it, but keep the overall feel informative rather than entertainment-first. This is not a one-off job; I’d like to build an ongoing rhythm—ideally a 24- to 48-hour turnaround once footage and a short beat-sheet land in your inbox. Please deliver both the final MP4 and the original project file (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci or your preferred NLE) so tweaks remain easy down the line. If the test reel clicks, you’ll have a steady stream of AI topics to edit every week. Drop me a link to two or three vertical vide

title: Print Ad for Digital Product - 01/06/2026 10:05 EDT
desc: I’m preparing to promote my newest digital product through a full-colour print placement and need a standout ad that grabs attention the moment someone turns the page. The piece must spotlight the product’s key benefits, include a clear call-to-action, and stay consistent with my existing brand palette (hex codes and logos will be provided). The format will run quarter-page in an industry magazine, so the layout has to be CMYK, 300 dpi, and include standard bleed and trim marks. Feel free to employ typography and imagery that evoke innovation and trust; stock photos are acceptable if licensed properly. Please craft both the visual concept and short, punchy copy. Source files can be built in Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, or Photoshop—whichever you prefer—as long as I receive the editable file alongside the final press-ready PDF. Deliverables • Two initial creative directions for review • One chosen concept refined through up to three rounds of revisions • Final CMYK PDF (with bleed & crop marks) • Layered source file (.ai, .indd, or .psd) and font list I’ll supply brand assets and product details as soon as we start, and I’m happy to answer any strategy questions so the ad converts as strongly in print as it does online. Looking forward to seeing your ideas.

title: Produce 3 Informative TikTok Stories
desc: I will supply fully-written scripts for three TikTok pieces, each expected to run between 60 and 90 seconds. Your task is to turn those words into engaging, narrative-style videos that feel informative rather than salesy, speaking directly to an adult audience that prefers clear, concise takeaways. The storytelling flow is already mapped out, so the emphasis falls on visuals, pacing, and smooth edits. Think quick hooks up front, purposeful B-roll or motion graphics that illustrate key points, subtle on-screen text to reinforce facts, and music or sound design that keeps the energy up without distracting from the message. Deliverables • 3 finished vertical videos (1080×1920, MP4 or MOV), 60-90 seconds each • Hard-coded or SRT captions timed accurately to the dialogue • Clean transitions and color-corrected footage that match across all three pieces • Project files (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci) so future tweaks are easy Acceptance criteria Each video should closely follow the provided script, stay within the time window, maintain an informative tone throughout, and hold viewer attention with a clear beginning, middle, and end. Videos must arrive ready to post on TikTok with no additional editing required on my side.

title: Refine Existing Logo into Elegant Spiritual Brand Identity
desc: Insructions for Designer: I am developing a spiritual/philosophical project called “Gateway Spiritualism” involving podcasting, writing, Substack articles, YouTube videos, and public-facing content centered around inner change, emotional honesty, and awakening from self-judgment and endless self-improvement. I already have an existing logo/artwork concept attached. I do NOT want a completely new concept created from scratch. Instead, I want the current imagery refined and distilled into a more professional, elegant, timeless logo and brand symbol. IMPORTANT: The existing artwork is more like symbolic artwork or cover art. I now want a true logo/brand identity that works cleanly across: • Substack • Podcast profiles • YouTube • Business cards • Social media • Website branding CORE SYMBOLISM TO PRESERVE: • Gateway / doorway • Awakening • Awareness / perception • Transformation • Inner passage or transition IMPORTANT DESIGN DIRECTION: The “gateway” or doorway element should remain central. I also like the symbolism of the eye as awakening/awareness, but I do NOT want a literal realistic eye or anything that feels: • occult • psychedelic • conspiracy-oriented • fantasy/New Age cliché • “all-seeing eye” imagery If the eye concept is used, it should be: • abstract • elegant • subtle •

title: Revise and Enhance Baby Shower Trivia Presentation
desc: I am looking for a creative freelancer to make revisions to an existing "Baby Shower Movie & Music Trivia" presentation created in Canva. The revisions include: - Improving the overall design to make it cuter and more visually appealing. - Ensuring the Finding Nemo clip is set to autoplay. - Removing redundant questions in the movie trivia sections (clip vs. photo sections). - Enhancing the music trivia section by selecting better parts of certain songs to play. The final product should maintain its interactive and user-friendly format, ready for use at a social celebration.

title: Seeking Video Editor for High-Energy Gaming Content & Shorts
desc: I am looking for a reliable, creative video editor to take my raw footage and turn it into engaging, high-retention content for YouTube and TikTok/Shorts. What I will provide: Raw gameplay footage (usually [X] hours per project) Occasional AI-generated clips or assets to integrate A clear outline of the story or focus for the video What I need from you: 1 Long-form Video: [8-12] minutes long, cut for pacing, flow, and comedy/action. [X] Short-form Videos: 30-60 second vertical clips repurposed from the main video, optimized for TikTok/Shorts with dynamic captions. Style/Vibe: Fast-paced, high energy, and visually engaging. You should know how to use zooms, sound effects, and text to keep viewers hooked. Game Knowledge: Familiarity with fast-paced shooters (like Apex Legends) is a massive plus, so you know which moments are actually impressive or funny. To apply, please include: The word "GLITCH" at the very top of your proposal so I know you read this. Links to 2-3 videos you've edited that have a similar high-energy or gaming style. Your estimated turnaround time for a project of this size. Your rate (per project or per hour). To prove you are a real human and not an AI auto-bidder, please include a link to a quick 30-second Loom (or unlisted YouTube) video of yourself. Tell me

title: Short Video Editing
desc: We have a single, 2 minute video that we would like edited down to two versions: a 60 to 75 second version, and a 25 to 35 second version. Both require a musical background and placement of text on screen to explain elements within the video. We will provide the text and direction of where to place it. And other detailed instructions/guidance.

title: Short Video Editing Packages Needed
desc: I need a reliable editor to turn my raw footage into clean, professional-looking videos that will be used across social posts, event promotions, and even the occasional vlog. Scope of work • Two length brackets: quick 30- to 60-second spots and longer 1- to 10-minute edits. • Clean, formal style—think corporate polish that still feels engaging for an event audience. • Typical tasks include trimming, colour correction, basic motion graphics for lower thirds/intros, royalty-free background music, and optional subtitles. Budget structure For the shorter cuts I’ve set aside ₹300–₹500 per piece; the longer edits fall in the ₹500–₹1,000 range. Let me know how many revisions you include within those figures. Deliverables 1. Final exports in 1080p (horizontal) and a social-ready vertical version when relevant. 2. Editable project files (Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve preferred). Please share links to similar event-focused or corporate edits you’ve completed, along with your typical turnaround time. I’m ready to start as soon as I find the right fit.

title: Short video editing
desc: We are a UK flooring business looking for a reliable video editor to turn raw footage from my phone into short, high-quality reels. The clips are from flooring installations, before-and-after shots, and completed projects. I need someone who can edit these into engaging short videos for Instagram Reels, WhatsApp Status, and LinkedIn. Work required includes trimming footage, adding music, captions, transitions, and creating a professional finish that showcases our work in a modern, clean style. This is ongoing work for the right person, as we regularly have new projects to edit.

title: Short-Form Video Editor Needed ASAP for Reels & Shorts
desc: Looking for a short-form video editor to turn raw footage into a clean, engaging Reel/Short/TikTok. The content has already been filmed, I need someone who can shape it into a polished final video with smooth pacing, strong flow, and professional editing that keeps attention. Requirements: • Vertical format (9:16) • Clean, modern editing style • Good storytelling rhythm and transitions • Add branding elements like logo and social handle • Ability to match a provided reference style Once we start, I’ll send the footage and creative direction. To apply, please send: • 2–3 relevant editing samples • Estimated turnaround time

title: Simple Motion Graphics for Music Video Titles – Quick Gig
desc: Hey! We’re looking for someone to create simple motion graphics for titles in a music video. It’s nothing too complex, mostly choosing a font and subtle motion, no crazy effects needed. We’ll provide references for the titles and all the materials you need. We always leave 5-star feedback! If this sounds like your kind of gig, please apply and include your portfolio

title: Simple Product Catalog Creation
desc: Looking for someone to create a very simple trailer product catalog. Basic Word document work with less than a dozen provided photos. Simple layout + photo insertion skills needed. Quick and easy project.

title: Social Media Graphics
desc: I want to refresh my Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter feeds with a consistent, eye-catching look. Specifically, I need three sets of assets for each platform: • Scroll-stopping post images that match my brand voice and current campaigns • Vertical story images formatted for each network’s recommended dimensions • High-performing ad banners ready for paid promotions Please design with current platform specs in mind and supply layered source files (PSD or AI) alongside ready-to-publish PNG/JPEG exports. I’ll share my logo, colour palette, and sample messaging once we start. Two quick revision rounds should be plenty; the goal is a polished, cohesive package I can roll out immediately.

title: Social Media Promoter and Content Creator
desc: My material-handling solutions company Intra Shiftix Private Limited is looking to hand over full responsibility for our online voice and reach. The goal is simple: grow brand awareness and generate qualified leads through consistent, high-impact promotional content on LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube. Scope of work You will plan, create, and publish promotional posts that feel fresh and persuasive, with a strong preference for short-form videos and striking posters tailored to each platform’s best practices. That includes developing the creative concept, writing concise copy, handling basic editing or motion graphics, and scheduling posts at optimal times. I expect you to engage with comments, monitor analytics, and refine future content based on performance data so we steadily expand our audience. Key deliverables • A 30-day content calendar with post captions, asset specs, and release dates • At least five punchy promo videos and three eye-catching posters per month • Weekly performance snapshot covering reach, engagement, and follower growth across all four platforms • End-of-month report with insights and next-month recommendations Acceptance criteria Content must align with our brand palette and tone, meet platform guidelines, and be delivered on schedule. Growth

title: Social Media setup| Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok (Freelancer or agency from the USA)
desc: We are a New York-based international matchmaking company connecting Asian women and Western men for serious relationships and marriage. We are looking for a freelancer or agency to help us build our social media presence from the ground up across Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok. And here are what we need you to handle: • Feed design: craft a cohesive grid aesthetic that echoes our brand guidelines and is easy for my internal team to maintain once the system is in place. • Reels & Carousels (plus Stories): deliver a batch of high-quality templates and finished posts, complete with captions, hashtags and cover images ready to publish. • Meta/Instagram ad support: set up the ad account structure, create several starter campaigns, configure audience targeting, basic ad groups and test campaigns. Then walk me through optimization best practices so we can scale confidently. • Brand direction: advise on tone, colour usage and content pillars so our messaging stays aligned across platforms, especially as we expand to TikTok.

title: Urgent Magazine Spread Ad Design
desc: I need someone to help me build a 2-page magazine spread ad as soon as possible. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and magazine layout, ensuring the ad is visually appealing and effectively communicates the message. The task requires quick turnaround and attention to detail.

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer for Podcast
desc: I need a stylish YouTube thumbnail for my podcast episodes. This will include creating an initial design that can then be subtly reworked for each episode in the same vein as high-end podcasts like Modern Widsom, Triggernometry etc. The ideal candidate should have experience in creating visually appealing thumbnails that capture attention and align with the podcast's theme. Creativity and consistency are key, as the design should be adaptable yet distinct for each episode. My hope is that this will turn into a long-term collaboration.

title: YouTube Thumbnails
desc: I have a video podcast that releases fortnightly. I need someone who is experienced in designing YouTube Thumbnails that are super engaging yet still professional. Ideally this is done in Canva so I can have access to edit text when needed.

title: Brand Strategist & Designer to Strengthen and Unify Existing Brand
desc: I am an established coach, retreat facilitator, TEDx speaker, and author with an existing website, logo, colour palette, and body of work. I am not looking for a complete rebrand or a new logo. I am looking for an experienced brand strategist and visual designer who can help me elevate, refine, and unify my existing brand across all platforms. My work centres around transformational coaching, retreats, personal development, nature, animals, and helping people reconnect with their authentic selves. My clients are often coaches, therapists, facilitators, authors, speakers, and other professionals who support growth and transformation in others. I have a website and visual identity that already reflect much of who I am. What I am seeking now is someone who can help bring greater clarity, consistency, and professionalism to the overall brand experience. What I Need • Review my existing website, messaging, and visual identity • Identify what is already working well and where the brand can be strengthened • Help clarify and refine my brand positioning and message • Create greater consistency across website, social media, webinars, presentations, and marketing materials • Refine visual elements such as typography, imagery, and design standards • Develop reusable templates that align wit

title: Charity Raffle Ticket with Stub
desc: I need a fresh, eye-catching raffle ticket designed for an upcoming charity draw. The ticket must include a detachable butt (stub) so we can keep track of sales, and the overall look should feel bright and vibrant rather than formal or neutral. The only content that has to appear on the face of the ticket right now is a clear, enticing description of the main prizes; I will fill in exact wording, event details, and serial numbering once the layout is approved. Sponsor logos are not required for this piece. I’m looking for a print-ready file that the printer can run without extra adjustments—CMYK, 300 dpi, with bleeds and crop marks—plus an editable source file (AI, PSD, or InDesign) so we can tweak text later if needed. Deliverables: • Full-colour ticket front • Matching detachable butt/stub design • High-resolution PDF ready for print • Editable layered source file I’d like a short initial concept, one round of refinements, then final artwork. If you’re comfortable working with bold palettes and have experience preparing print collateral, I’m ready to get this moving right away. Must be editable for me on Canva

title: Coaching Institute Banner Design
desc: I need a clean, premium-looking roadside banner (10 ft × 5 ft) for my coaching institute, DYNAMIC SOLUTION CLASSES. The design must feel professional and serious, stay readable from a distance, and present information without clutter. Core copy to feature – exactly as written: • Institute name: DYNAMIC SOLUTION CLASSES • Tagline: Where Learning Meets Success • Courses Offered: Pre-Foundation: 5th to 8th (All Subjects) 9th & 10th: Maths, Science, Social Science, English 11th & 12th: PCMB & Commerce • Highlight: ADMISSIONS OPEN • Contact (make 8103332901 the most prominent, then 8989871223 and 9589110600) • Location: Railway Station Road, Multai • Features: Small Batch Size · Personal Attention · Regular Tests · Doubt Sessions Visual direction • Primary colour #046CB8, secondary #02ADEF, CMYK-ready. • Big, bold Inter font across headings and key numbers. • Icons that hint at subjects, a confident but minimal photo of students, and understated geometric elements to maintain a modern, minimalistic feel. • Balanced spacing and alignment so every line is instantly legible from the road. Deliverables (within 24 hours) 1. Editable layered PSD 2. Print-ready PDF in CMYK, high resolution suitable for large-format flex printing (no pixelation) I’ll sign off once the file opens cleanly, colo

title: Design Pitch Deck for Nonprofit
desc: We are seeking a skilled freelancer to create a visually appealing and effective pitch deck for our nonprofit organization. The deck will be used to attract funding for a new teaching resource. The ideal candidate will have experience in creating engaging presentations, particularly for educational or nonprofit projects. Your work will help us effectively communicate our mission and vision to potential funders.

title: Event Flyer Design for Nonprofit Virtual Event
desc: We are looking for a designer to create a professional flyer for an upcoming nonprofit virtual event. We will provide: - Event text - Moderator and panelist headshots - Organization logo - Brand colors and design inspiration Your role is to create a clean, visually appealing flyer that clearly presents the event details and speakers. Feel free to suggest edits to the text if it improves readability or design. Deliverables - LinkedIn: 1080 × 1080 px - Instagram: 1080 × 1080 px - Luma: 800 × 800 px - Print (A4): 2480 × 3508 px at 300 DPI Files Required - Editable Canva source file - PNG exports - Print-ready PDF Deadline June 9, 2026 at 6:00 PM PT Please include examples of similar event flyer or social media design work.

title: Event Flyer Design for Nonprofit Virtual Event
desc: Event Flyer Design for Nonprofit Virtual Event We are seeking a graphic designer to create a professional event flyer for an upcoming nonprofit virtual event. The event will feature two PhD researchers as speakers and one moderator. We will provide all event copy, headshots, logos, and branding assets. Design Requirements * Include three headshots: one moderator and two speakers * Create a clean, modern, and professional design * Ensure all text is easy to read across desktop, mobile, and print formats * Use strong visual hierarchy, spacing, and typography * Incorporate provided branding, logos, and color scheme * Optimize the layout for both social media and print Deliverables Please provide the flyer in the following formats: * LinkedIn Post: 1080 × 1080 px * Instagram Feed: 1080 × 1080 px * Luma Event Cover: 800 × 800 px * Print (US Letter): 8.5 × 11 in at 300 DPI (2550 × 3300 px) Files Required * Editable Canva source file * High-resolution PNG exports * Print-ready PDF Timeline Deadline: End of Day, June 9, 2026 Please include examples of similar event flyers, conference marketing materials, nonprofit campaigns, or social media graphics in your proposal.

title: Event Flyer Designer Needed for Nonprofit Networking Event
desc: We're seeking a graphic designer to create a professional event flyer for an nonprofit mentorship networking event. Deliverables • LinkedIn flyer • Instagram flyer • Luma cover image • Print-ready PDF • Editable source files (Canva preferred) We'll Provide • Event photos • Event details • Nonprofit logo • QR code Requirements • Modern, professional design • Mobile-friendly and easy to read • Experience with event, nonprofit, or community flyers preferred Timeline Final flyer needed by EOD June 9, 2026. Please share 2–3 examples of similar work with your proposal.

title: Graphic Design for Fundraising Event
desc: We are seeking a skilled graphic designer who can create an invitation for a upcoming fundraising event. Can provide more information on what the invite should include when time comes. Most interested in the layout, colors and engagement of a design.

title: Graphic Designer
desc: We are a nonprofit organization producing an annual animation and comics festival, and we’re looking for a thoughtful, detail-oriented Graphic Designer to support our visual needs on an ongoing, as-needed basis. This role includes creating social media graphics across standard platforms, as well as designing materials that support the full festival experience, such as badges, signage, banners, and printed items like brochures, postcards, and bookmarks. We’re looking for someone who is comfortable working in Canva and/or Adobe Photoshop, and who can maintain consistency across a range of formats while adapting designs for different uses. Beyond technical skills, it’s important that this person can anticipate needs, stay organized with files and versions, and pay close attention to detail. Much of this work will be collaborative, so clear communication and the ability to take direction while also being proactive are key. This is not a full-time role, but rather project-based and ongoing. Work will ebb and flow throughout the year, with increased activity leading up to major events and especially the festival itself. We’re hoping to find someone who is experienced in managing freelance work, can balance multiple priorities, and has the flexibility to scale up during busier periods.

title: Graphic Designer for Photo Album Cover
desc: I need a graphic designer to create the front cover of a digital photo album for a charity golf day. The design should be visually appealing and align with the theme of the event. The photographer will add the photos to the album. The project requires creativity and attention to detail to ensure a professional finish. Would need to be completed by 8th June at the latest.
